title: Peddlin' in Society
writer: Vittorio Calvino, Vittorio De Sica, Mario Monicelli
actors: Anna Magnani, Vittorio De Sica, Virgilio Riento
plot: Thanks to wartime smuggling Gioconda Perfetti, a roman fruit vendor, becomes very rich. She leaves her shop and moves to a magnificent villa which once belonged to a count. She also becomes involved with some very dubious characte...
